Mufasa: The Lion King (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $254,567,693Details
International Box Office $468,064,063
Worldwide Box Office $722,631,756
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mufasa is an orphaned cub, lost and alone until he meets a sympathetic lion named Taka—the heir to a royal bloodline. The chance meeting sets in motion an expansive journey of an extraordinary group of misfits searching for their destiny, and their bonds will be tested as they work together to evade a threatening and deadly foe.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$35,409,365 (13.9% of total gross)
Legs:6.92 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,100 opening theaters/4,100 max. theaters, 9.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $261,932,282

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2024 (Wide) by Walt Disney
December 20th, 2024 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Philippines)
December 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
December 18th, 2024 (Wide), released as Mufasa Lejonkungen (Sweden)
December 18th, 2024 (Wide), released as Mufasa: The Lion King (무파사: 라이온 킹) (South Korea)
December 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: February 18th, 2025 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action/violence, peril and some thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2852 (cert #55021), 9/18/2024)

Synopsis

Mufasa is an orphaned cub, lost and alone until he meets a sympathetic lion named Taka—the heir to a royal bloodline. The chance meeting sets in motion an expansive journey of an extraordinary group of misfits searching for their destiny, and their bonds will be tested as they work together to evade a threatening and deadly foe.
